Base directory for this skill: /home/node/mulmoclaude/.claude/skills/reading-list

# Reading List (schema-driven collection)

## Record shape

- `id` — kebab-case slug of the title (e.g. `snow-crash`), primary key
- `title` — string, required
- `author` — string, optional
- `status` — enum: `To Read` | `Reading` | `Finished`, required
- `done` — toggle projecting `status` (Finished ↔ To Read); host-computed, never write it
- `finishedOn` — date `YYYY-MM-DD`, only meaningful when status is Finished
- `rating` — number 1–5, only when Finished
- `notes` — markdown, optional

## What to do

**Add** — `manageCollection` putItems with `mode: "create"` (rejects id collisions).
New books default to `status: "To Read"`.
**Update** — putItems with `mode: "merge"` and a partial row (`{ id, <changed fields> }`).
Marking finished = set `status: "Finished"` and `finishedOn` to today's date.
**List / Read** — getItems (the only way to see the `done` toggle value).
**Delete** — remove `data/reading-list/items/<id>.json`.
**Schema changes** — `manageCollection` getSchema → putSchema; never hand-edit schema.json.

Never write `done` (toggle projection) into a record. After changes, call
`presentCollection` with slug `reading-list` (plus the record id for a single
book) instead of reciting the table in chat.
